metadata.website_type: local family events and activities guide

tasks.name: Favorite 2 free outdoor events for ages 5–8 within 10 miles this Saturday
tasks.description: Find outdoor events happening on the upcoming Saturday, filter to free events suitable for ages 5–8 within 10 miles, and add the first two results to your favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar in the header and type "outdoor".
Click the date picker next to the search bar and select the upcoming Saturday from the calendar.
Open the "Age range" filter in the sidebar and select the 5–8 age group checkbox.
Open the "Price" filter and select the option labeled "Free only".
Open the "Distance" filter and set the maximum distance to 10 miles from your default location.
Click the "Sort by" dropdown above the results and choose "Start time – Earliest first".
In the filtered results list, click on the first event card to open its details page.
On the event details page, click the "Add to Favorites" button.
Use the back navigation to return to the results list, click on the second event card, and then click the "Add to Favorites" button on that event’s details page.

tasks.name: Plan a full Sunday with 3 events (morning indoor under $20, afternoon park, evening show under $50)
tasks.description: Use filters to plan a full day for Sunday by adding exactly three events to a day plan: one indoor event before noon costing $20 or less, one afternoon park event, and one evening show costing $50 or less.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the calendar icon in the main navigation and select the upcoming Sunday as the active date.
Open the "Categories" filter and select the "Indoor" category.
Open the "Price" filter, set the maximum price to $20, and apply the filter.
Open the "Time of day" filter and select the "Morning (before 12 PM)" option.
From the filtered indoor results, click the first event card shown and on its details page click the "Add to Day Plan" button.
Use the site navigation to return to the results list, then in the "Categories" filter switch the selection to "Parks & Playgrounds" and in the "Time of day" filter select "Afternoon (12–5 PM)".
From the park results, click the first event card shown and click the "Add to Day Plan" button on its details page.

Return to the results list, switch the "Categories" filter to "Shows & Performances", open the "Time of day" filter and select "Evening (after 5 PM)", then open the "Price" filter and set the maximum price to $50.
Click the "Sort by" dropdown, choose "Price – Low to High", then click the first show in the sorted list and click the "Add to Day Plan" button on its details page.

tasks.name: Register two children for the cheapest Saturday morning workshop for ages 10–12 under $40 next month
tasks.description: Find workshops scheduled next month for ages 10–12 on Saturday mornings, filter to options under $40 per ticket, select the cheapest one, and complete a registration form for 2 spots.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Workshops & Classes" category in the main navigation.
Open the date range picker and select the entire next calendar month as the date range.
Open the "Age range" filter and select the 10–12 age group.
Open the "Day of week" filter and select "Saturday", then open the "Time of day" filter and select "Morning (before 12 PM)".
Open the "Price" filter, set the maximum price to $40 per ticket, and apply the filter.
Click the "Sort by" dropdown above the results and select "Price – Low to High".
Click on the first workshop in the sorted list (the cheapest option) to open its details page.
On the workshop details page, click the "Register" or "Book Now" button to open the registration form.
In the registration form, enter "2" in the number of participants field, fill in the parent/guardian name field with "Alex Rivera", and fill in the contact phone field with "555-0123".
Select the available Saturday morning session from any session dropdown or time list on the form, then click the "Confirm Registration" button.

tasks.name: Choose the best family membership under $150 with the most included free events and add it to cart
tasks.description: Compare family membership options under $150, identify the membership plan that includes the highest number of free events, and add that plan to the cart.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Memberships & Passes" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the memberships page, open the "Membership type" filter and select "Family".
Open the "Price" filter, set the maximum price to $150, and apply the filter to show only memberships under $150.
Click the "Compare" checkbox or button for the first three family membership options listed.
Click the "Compare selected" button to open the membership comparison view.
In the comparison table, identify the membership that lists the highest number in the row labeled "Included free events per year".
Click the membership name or "View details" link for the plan with the highest number of included free events to open its details page.
On the membership details page, click the "Add to Cart" button.
If prompted to choose a billing period, select the annual billing option and confirm by clicking the "Add" or "Continue" button.

tasks.name: Save 3 weekly weekday classes for ages 3–4 after 4 PM within 5 miles to a watchlist
tasks.description: Find recurring weekly classes for 3–4-year-olds that take place on weekdays after 4 PM within 5 miles, and add the first three matching classes to a watchlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage and click on the "Classes" or "Ongoing Programs" section in the main navigation.
Open the "Age range" filter and select the 3–4 age group.
Open the "Schedule" filter and select the "Weekly" recurrence option.
Open the "Day of week" filter, select all weekdays (Monday through Friday), then open the "Time of day" filter and choose "After 4 PM".
Open the "Distance" filter and set the maximum distance to 5 miles from your default location.
Click the "Sort by" dropdown and select "Distance – Nearest first".
From the filtered list, click on the first class card and on its details page click the "Add to Watchlist" button.
Use the back navigation to return to the list, click on the second class card, and click the "Add to Watchlist" button on its details page.
Return again to the list, click on the third class card, and click the "Add to Watchlist" button on that class’s details page.

tasks.name: Add 2 nearby events (playground and storytime) within 2 miles of a specific neighborhood to your day plan using the map view
tasks.description: Using the map view, focus on a specific neighborhood, find one playground-type event and one storytime event within 2 miles of that area, and add both events to your day plan.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Map" or "Map View" toggle to switch to the map-based event view.
Use the map search field to type the neighborhood name "Riverside Park" and select it from any suggested locations to center the map on that area.
Open the "Distance" or "Radius" control on the map and set it to 2 miles around the selected area.
Open the "Categories" filter and select only the "Playground" category.
Click on the first playground event marker or pin shown within the 2-mile radius and in the event popup click the "Add to Day Plan" button.
Open the "Categories" filter again, deselect "Playground", and select the "Storytime" category.
Click on the first storytime event marker or pin shown within the 2-mile radius and in the event popup click the "Add to Day Plan" button.

tasks.name: Favorite 2 holiday events (free daytime parade with free parking and evening lights display under $25) between Dec 20–24
tasks.description: Within the date range Dec 20–24, find one daytime holiday parade tagged with free parking and one evening holiday lights display with tickets under $25, then add both events to your favorites.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Seasonal & Holiday" category in the main navigation.
Open the date range picker and select December 20 as the start date and December 24 as the end date.
Open the "Tags" or "Features" filter and select the "Holiday" tag.
Open the "Time of day" filter and select "Daytime (before 5 PM)", then open the search bar and type "parade".
From the filtered parade results, locate the first event with a visible "Free parking" tag or badge, click its event card, and on its details page click the "Add to Favorites" button.
Use the navigation to return to the holiday events list, clear the search term, open the "Time of day" filter and select "Evening (after 5 PM)".
Open the search bar and type "lights", then open the "Price" filter and set the maximum ticket price to $25.
From the filtered lights display results, click on the first event card and then click the "Add to Favorites" button on its details page.

tasks.name: Save 2 highly rated sensory-friendly indoor events for this weekend to a favorites list
tasks.description: Find indoor sensory-friendly events for this upcoming weekend that are stroller-friendly and have ratings of at least 4.5 stars, then add the first two matching events to your favorites list.
steps: From the homepage, click the date shortcut or calendar option labeled "This Weekend" to set the date range to the upcoming Saturday and Sunday.
Open the "Categories" filter and select the "Indoor" category.
Open the "Accessibility" or "Special features" filter and select both the "Sensory-friendly" and "Stroller-friendly" options.
Open the "Rating" filter and set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars.
Click the "Sort by" dropdown and select "Rating – High to Low".
From the filtered results, click the first event card and on its details page click the "Add to Favorites" button.
Use the back navigation to return to the results list, click the second event card, and click the "Add to Favorites" button on that event’s details page.

entities.name: Activity
entities.description: Any listed thing a family can attend: events, classes, workshops, seasonal/holiday activities, playground/storytime map items.

fields.name: content_group
fields.description: Top-level context used by header links and browse categoryId.

fields.name: activity_category
fields.description: Category used by filters like Indoor, Parks & Playgrounds, Shows & Performances, Playground, Storytime.

fields.name: min_age
fields.description: Minimum recommended age in years (e.g., 5).

fields.name: max_age
fields.description: Maximum recommended age in years (e.g., 8).

fields.name: price_type
fields.description: Used to support 'Free only' filtering.

fields.name: price_min
fields.description: Lowest ticket price for this activity (per unit defined by price_unit).

fields.name: price_max
fields.description: Highest ticket price for this activity, used for max price filters.

fields.name: price_currency
fields.description: Currency code, e.g., 'USD'.

fields.name: price_unit
fields.description: Unit for price values; supports 'per ticket' wording in tasks.

fields.name: schedule_recurrence
fields.description: Supports 'Schedule – Weekly' filter for classes/programs.

fields.name: first_start_datetime
fields.description: Start of first occurrence; helps date-based browsing.

fields.name: last_end_datetime
fields.description: End of last occurrence; supports date-range filters like Dec 20–24.

fields.name: location_id
fields.description: Links to Location for distance and map view.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Array of tag enums for filters like Holiday and Free parking. Values: holiday, free_parking.

fields.name: accessibility_features
fields.description: Array of accessibility enums, e.g., sensory_friendly, stroller_friendly.

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Average star rating (0–5, supports 4.5+ filter).

fields.name: rating_count
fields.description: Number of ratings; useful for display and sorting.

fields.name: is_featured
fields.description: Used on home page highlights.

fields.name: booking_required
fields.description: Indicates whether any registration is required.

fields.name: registration_available
fields.description: Controls visibility of 'Register' / 'Book Now' button.

entities.name: ActivitySession
entities.description: Individual dated occurrences/time slots for an activity used for date, time-of-day, and registration.

fields.name: day_of_week
fields.description: Supports 'Day of week' filter (Saturday, weekdays).

fields.name: time_of_day_bucket
fields.description: Supports 'Morning (before 12 PM)', 'Afternoon (12–5 PM)', 'Evening (after 5 PM)', 'Daytime (before 5 PM)', 'After 4 PM' filters.

fields.name: is_weekend
fields.description: Helps implement 'This Weekend' shortcut.

entities.name: Location
entities.description: Physical place where activities occur; supports distance filters and map view.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Venue or place name, e.g., 'Riverside Park'.

fields.name: neighborhood
fields.description: Neighborhood label used by map search, e.g., 'Riverside Park'.

fields.name: has_free_parking
fields.description: Supports 'Free parking' badge/tag.

fields.name: indoor_outdoor_type
fields.description: Can support some Indoor/Outdoor logic when tied to place rather than activity.

entities.name: Membership
entities.description: Membership or pass product that can be added to the cart (e.g., Family memberships).

fields.name: membership_type
fields.description: Supports 'Membership type – Family' filter.

fields.name: billing_period_default
fields.description: Default billing period shown on details page.

fields.name: billing_period_options
fields.description: Array of allowed billing period enums (annual, monthly) for user selection.

fields.name: included_free_events_per_year
fields.description: Row used in comparison view to choose best plan.

fields.name: benefits
fields.description: List of benefit descriptions.

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart holding selected memberships/passes (single cart for this agent).

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of cart item identifiers or embedded summaries.

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line item in the cart, currently only for memberships.

fields.name: billing_period
fields.description: Chosen billing period for this membership (e.g., annual).

fields.name: price
fields.description: Price for this line (can copy from Membership at time of add).

entities.name: Registration
entities.description: Registration/booking records for workshops, classes, and bookable events.

fields.name: participants_count
fields.description: Number of spots requested (e.g., 2 children).

entities.name: FavoritesList
entities.description: Container for one or more favorites collections (at minimum a default list).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name, e.g., 'Favorites'.

entities.name: FavoriteItem
entities.description: Individual favorited activities (events, classes, seasonal items).

entities.name: DayPlan
entities.description: A planned day of activities for a specific calendar date.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date for this plan (morning/afternoon/evening slots).

entities.name: DayPlanItem
entities.description: An activity scheduled into a day plan for a certain time of day.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Specific session if the activity has multiple time slots.

fields.name: time_of_day_bucket
fields.description: Used to organize day plan into morning/afternoon/evening.

entities.name: Watchlist
entities.description: Saved list for ongoing classes and programs the user is interested in.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name for this watchlist (e.g., 'Classes Watchlist').

entities.name: WatchlistItem
entities.description: Individual class/program entries saved to a watchlist.
